notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte plunked
notableEvents.detail: Diamondbacks challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Ketel Marte hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit by pitch. Adrian Del Castillo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson grounds into a double play, pitcher Merrill Kelly to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Chandler Simpson out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson grounds into a double play, pitcher Merrill Kelly to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Chandler Simpson out at 1st.
